label: Guttman 1984
title: R-Trees: A Dynamic Index Structure for Spatial Searching
notes: The original R-tree paper. NumStore's tree layout descends from this design.

label: Sellis et al. 1987
title: The R+-Tree: A Dynamic Index for Multi-Dimensional Objects
notes: Introduces the R+ tree variant NumStore uses as its core index structure.

label: Mohan et al. 1992
title: ARIES: A Transaction Recovery Method Supporting Fine-Granularity Locking and Partial Rollbacks Using Write-Ahead Logging
notes: The ARIES recovery algorithm that informs NumStore's WAL design.

label: Graefe 2004
title: Write-Optimized B-Trees
notes: Covers write-buffering techniques considered during WAL segment design.

label: SQLite WAL
title: Write-Ahead Logging
notes: SQLite's WAL design heavily influenced NumStore's segment layout and checkpointing strategy.

label: O'Neil et al. 1996
title: The Log-Structured Merge-Tree (LSM-Tree)
notes: LSM-tree reference point for write-amplification trade-offs; NumStore's R+ tree takes a different approach.
